section_name: Department inspection of vehicles for compliance
text: The Department of Transportation may at any time inspect any vehicle to determine its compliance with the equipment provisions and other provisions of the vehicle code. [1983 c.338 §436]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.015 — Department inspection of vehicles for compliance

The Department of Transportation may at any time inspect any vehicle to determine its compliance with the equipment provisions and other provisions of the vehicle code. [1983 c.338 §436]

subsections.text: The Department of Transportation may at any time inspect any vehicle to determine its compliance with the equipment provisions and other provisions of the vehicle code. [1983 c.338 §436]
